Operation 'getRecipientHistory' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about what is returned (list of packages with metadata), the types of packages included (sent/received), and parameter requirements. Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose, expected input (email address), output structure (package list with metadata), and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation for recipient activity tracking.

data.current_description: Retrieve the package history for a specific recipient email address.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete package history for a specific recipient identified by their email address. Returns a list of packages that have been sent to or received by the recipient, including package metadata such as timestamps, sender information, and package status. Requires the recipient's email address as a path parameter.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about what is returned (list of packages with metadata), the types of packages included (sent/received), and parameter requirements. Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose, expected input (email address), output structure (package list with metadata), and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation for recipient activity tracking.

message: Operation 'verifyVersion' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description is vague about what 'compatibility' means and doesn't explain the parameters or return value. Enhanced description clarifies the purpose (checking if client version is supported), explains the two required parameters (platform and versionNo), indicates what is returned (compatibility status), and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

data.current_description: Verify the client API version compatibility.
data.description_suggestion: Verify that the client API version is compatible with the server. Accepts platform identifier and version number as parameters. Returns compatibility status indicating whether the client version is supported by the server. Use this operation before making other API calls to ensure version compatibility.
data.reasoning: Current description is vague about what 'compatibility' means and doesn't explain the parameters or return value. Enhanced description clarifies the purpose (checking if client version is supported), explains the two required parameters (platform and versionNo), indicates what is returned (compatibility status), and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

message: Operation 'addDropzoneRecipient' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is minimal and lacks critical details. Enhanced description specifies what input is expected (recipient details like email), what is returned (the created recipient object), and the side effect (recipient becomes available for package delivery). This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in response.

data.current_description: Add a new dropzone recipient.
data.description_suggestion: Add a new dropzone recipient to the current user's dropzone recipient list. Accepts recipient details in the request body (email address and optional name). Returns the newly created dropzone recipient object with assigned identifier. The recipient becomes immediately available for receiving packages via dropzone.
data.reasoning: Current description is minimal and lacks critical details. Enhanced description specifies what input is expected (recipient details like email), what is returned (the created recipient object), and the side effect (recipient becomes available for package delivery). This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in response.

message: Operation 'getPublicKeys' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks clarity about the return format and practical use case. Added context about what the public keys are used for (client-side encryption) and that they are returned as a collection, improving AI agent understanding of when and why to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Get public keys for a package
data.current_description: Retrieve the public keys associated with a package's recipients.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the public keys associated with a package's recipients. Returns a collection of public keys that can be used for encrypting data intended for the package recipients. Useful for client-side encryption operations before uploading files.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about the return format and practical use case. Added context about what the public keys are used for (client-side encryption) and that they are returned as a collection, improving AI agent understanding of when and why to use this operation.

message: Operation 'addMessage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too minimal. Added details about message visibility to recipients, encryption requirement, return value, and the constraint that only one message per package is allowed. This helps AI agents understand the operation's constraints and proper usage.

data.current_summary: Add a secure message to a package
data.current_description: Add an encrypted message to a package.
data.description_suggestion: Add an encrypted message to a package that will be displayed to recipients. The message content should be encrypted before submission. Returns confirmation of the message addition. Only one message can be associated with a package.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added details about message visibility to recipients, encryption requirement, return value, and the constraint that only one message per package is allowed. This helps AI agents understand the operation's constraints and proper usage.

message: Operation 'createFileId' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks information about the return value and the relationship to subsequent operations. Added clarity that this is step one of a two-step process and that the returned file ID is required for the uploadFile operation, improving AI agent workflow understanding.

data.current_summary: Create a file placeholder in a package
data.current_description: Create a file ID for uploading a file to the root directory of a package.
data.description_suggestion: Create a file ID placeholder for uploading a file to the root directory of a package. Returns a file ID that must be used in subsequent uploadFile operations. This is the first step in a two-step file upload process.
data.reasoning: Description lacks information about the return value and the relationship to subsequent operations. Added clarity that this is step one of a two-step process and that the returned file ID is required for the uploadFile operation, improving AI agent workflow understanding.

message: Operation 'uploadFile' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic. Description lacks context about encryption requirement and the two-step process relationship. Enhanced both to clarify that data must be pre-encrypted, that this completes the upload workflow, and that it returns confirmation of success.

data.current_description: Upload encrypted file data to a previously created file placeholder.
data.summary_suggestion: Upload encrypted file data to package
data.description_suggestion: Upload encrypted file data to a previously created file placeholder identified by fileId. The file data must be encrypted before submission. Returns confirmation of successful upload. This completes the two-step file upload process initiated by createFileId.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks context about encryption requirement and the two-step process relationship. Enhanced both to clarify that data must be pre-encrypted, that this completes the upload workflow, and that it returns confirmation of success.

message: Operation 'getFileDownloadUrls' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks information about what is returned and important context about URL temporality. Added details that multiple URLs may be returned, that they are for recipients to use, and that they have expiration behavior based on package configuration.

data.current_description: Get download URLs for a file in the root directory of a package.
data.description_suggestion: Get download URLs for a file in the root directory of a package. Returns one or more download URLs that recipients can use to retrieve the encrypted file. URLs are temporary and may expire based on package settings.
data.reasoning: Description lacks information about what is returned and important context about URL temporality. Added details that multiple URLs may be returned, that they are for recipients to use, and that they have expiration behavior based on package configuration.

message: Operation 'getDirectory' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is vague about what 'contents' means. Added clarity that both files and subdirectories are returned, that the response is a structured directory object, and that this supports hierarchical navigation for AI agents to understand the data structure.
